2605.21486.title: Quantifying Hyperparameter Transfer and the Importance of Embedding Layer Learning Rate
2605.21486.paper_summary: Hyperparameter transfer allows extrapolating optimal optimization hyperparameters from small to large scales, making it critical for training large language models (LLMs). This is done either by fitting a scaling law to the hyperparameters or by a judicious choice of parameterization, such as Maximal Update ($μ$P), that renders optimal hyperparameters approximately scale invariant. In this paper, we first develop a framework to quantify hyperparameter transfer through three metrics: (1) the quality of the scaling law fit, (2) the robustness to extrapolation errors, and (3) the asymptotic loss penalty due to choice of parameterization. Next, we investigate through a comprehensive series of ablations why $μ$P appears to offer high-quality learning rate transfer relative to standard parameterization (SP), as existing theory is inadequate. We find that the overwhelming benefit of $μ$P relative to SP when training with AdamW arises simply from maximizing the learning rate of the embedding layer. In SP, the embedding layer learning rate acts as a bottleneck that induces training instabilities; increasing it by a factor of width to match $μ$P dramatically smooths out training while improving hyperparameter transfer. We also find that weight decay improves the scaling law fits, while, in the fixed token-per-parameter setting, it hurts the robustness of the extrapolation.
2605.21486.paper_summary_zh: 超參數轉移允許從小規模推斷出最佳的優化超參數到大規模，這對於訓練大型語言模型（LLMs）至關重要。這可以通過將縮放法則擬合到超參數上，或通過明智的參數化選擇，例如最大更新（$μ$P），使得最佳超參數大致上具備尺度不變性。本文中，我們首先開發了一個框架，通過三個指標來量化超參數轉移：（1）縮放法則擬合的質量，（2）對外推誤差的穩健性，以及（3）由於參數化選擇而產生的漸近損失懲罰。接下來，我們通過一系列全面的消融實驗調查為什麼相對於標準參數化（SP），$μ$P似乎提供了高質量的學習率轉移，因為現有理論不足。我們發現，當使用AdamW進行訓練時，$μ$P相對於SP的壓倒性優勢僅來自於最大化嵌入層的學習率。在SP中，嵌入層的學習率作為瓶頸，導致訓練不穩定；將其增加到與$μ$P相匹配的寬度因子會顯著平滑訓練，同時改善超參數轉移。我們還發現，權重衰減改善了縮放法則擬合，而在固定的每參數令牌設置中，則會損害外推的穩健性。
2605.21486.author: Dayal Singh Kalra et.al.
